SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_deerclops_yule:
The night had seemed dead 'fore the sound broke the hush.
There! Something doth stir in the thick underbrush.
THUMP, THUMP, CLOMP, CLOMP, sound its footsteps together,
Then you sight the clumped fur, the thin legs like black leather.
Its eye trains on yours in a horrid red glow,
...How swift might you flee through the knee-deep snow?

The Feastfly takes wing in a most fervid flight.

SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_eyeofthestorm_: Few things can set the Queen of the Constant herself on edge...
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_farming:
The days have been filled with tilling and toil,
Gathering seeds and nourishing soil,
In hopes that the crops will produce at their best,
(Just make sure that you keep a sharp eye out for pests!)
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_farming2: Not everyone has a talent for farming.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_feast:
The food is prepared, the table is set,
Gather round for a feast that you won't soon forget.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_gameplay_trail:
The future might be daunting,
(The present's scary too)
But if the past has taught us anything,
Together, we'll get through.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_gingersnow: When the air grows colder and snow covers the ground, a gingerbread village can sometimes be found.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_gnarwail: The sea poses many dangers, one must always be prepared for rough waters.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_goats_victoria:
"Always hold the board steady. Remember, a sharp knife is safer than a dull one.
Don't forget."
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_goosemoose_yul:
A large plump goose sounds fit for a feast,
Unless you're the meal for the terrible beast.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_grotto: You won't be able to run forever.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_grotto2: The Lunar Island wasn't the only consequence of the moon fragment's impact into the sea. It also revealed a part of the caves long since sealed away and forgotten. One might wonder if landing on that spot was really a coincidence...
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_lunacy: Open your mind to terrifying new possibilities.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_lunar: Be on your guard, these unearthly visitors do not appear to come in peace.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_lunarrift: Something is possessing the Constant's creatures... something not of this world...
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_magma: Battlemaster Pugna draws great pleasure in subjecting combatants to the whims of his Battlearena forged of stone and fire.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_magma2: To escape the fiery Forge, our Survivors must triumph in battle against Battlemaster Pugna's fearsome champions.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_maxwell: Maxwell's extended reign on the Nightmare Throne altered him in ways that are not yet fully understood. He continues to rely heavily on his tome, the Codex Umbra, as a result.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_maxwell2: Maxwell grew quite accustomed to a world that followed his rules... but now someone else is pulling the strings.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_merm: Merms inhabited the marshes of The Constant long before humans, and will probably exist long after.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_newhorizons: The path ahead is long and treacherous, but you've come too far to turn back now.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_pig_elite: The Pig King's four elite warriors give half their winnings to those poor unfortunate pigs with no mud to roll in.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_pigking: Legend has it the Pig King and his followers left their home long ago to rule freely in The Constant.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_piglio1: Love can be found in the least likely places.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_piglio2: The enemy of my enemy is my friend... or maybe something more?
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_piglio3: Can a merm and a pig put their differences aside to save themselves?
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_piglio4: Nothing kills a romantic moment quite like a swarm of hungry spiders.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_piglio5: This herd is riled up and on the rampage!
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_piglio6: Merms are fiercely territorial, and won't allow any outsiders on their turf.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_piglio7: There are few things a pig loves more than a relaxing dip in the mud.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_pirates1: If you wish to sail the open sea, best beware the pirates of Moon Quay!
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_rainingfrog: It's unseasonably froggy out for this time of year.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_roadmap: Could there be light at the end of the tunnel?
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_roadmap2: Survivors that dared to make camp on the lunar island often claim to have been visited by strange apparitions.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_shadow: What terrors lurk in the darkest depths of the Constant?
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_shadow2: Trees don't hit back, but Treeguards do.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_shadowrift: "Freeing him might not have been my best idea."
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_terraria_trail: One teensy little mishap has plunged the world of Terraria into rather... constant danger, and is terrarizing the Constant like nothing before! Who knows what might slip through the cracks when two worlds collide?
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_triplethreat: Bad luck comes in threes, and so do Ink Blights.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_walter_trailer: Friendship can be found in the most unlikely places.
On a night like this, one doesn't want to travel alone.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wanda1: Traveling back and forth through time gets disorienting after a while. Trying to remember the events of multiple timelines can make one appear a bit scatterbrained.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wanda_trailer: Wanda has been trying to outrun her future for longer than she can remember - but after a split-second decision left her tangled up in the Constant's timestream, it might be her past that's finally catching up to her...
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_warly2_trailer:
There are some memories that never leave you.
For Warly, they are the smell of an old family recipe, and the warmth of his dear Maman's hugs.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_warly_trailer: Warly will never give up hope that he'll see the sweet smile of his dear Maman again.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_waterlogged: These towering oceanic trees might offer a moment of respite from the dangers of the open sea, but nowhere in the Constant is truly safe for long.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_waterlogged_tr: Sailing beneath the comforting shade of the Drift Wood's Great Tree, it's all too easy to forget the danger that dangles above.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_waxwell: Everyone take your seats, the Amazing Maxwell's next act is about to begin.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_webber: Webber could have easily seen his unique predicament as an affliction or a curse. Instead, he's chosen to view it as a second chance, and one that he fully intends not to waste.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_webber2: These days, Webber doesn't have to go far to find a friend.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_webber_feast: "We're super excited to watch everyone open the presents we got them."
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_webber_sad: Listen well children, and mind the warnings of your parents... naughtiness always comes back to bite you in the end.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_webber_trailer: Some things simply can't be undone.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wendy: Wendy clings fiercely to the grief over her sister's death, for fear that moving on would cause Abigail's memory to fade.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wendy_blogpost: "I know you're still there, Abigail... we'll be able to play together again soon."
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wendy_creepy:
She can't escape her monomaniacal obsession with death.
Neither can you.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wendy_trailer: Abigail could always find a way to bring a smile to Wendy's face... sadly, she would later become the reason it went away for good.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wendy_victoria:
Wendy finds a strange comfort in elaborate mourning rituals.
It takes the guesswork out of grieving.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_werepig1: Gather round, everyone. Ready to hear a spooky story?
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_werepig2: Campfire stories are best enjoyed with a group of friends on eerie, moonlit nights.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_werepig3: The werepig will gladly have you over for dinner.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_werepig4: Nothing beats the taste of ill-gotten grub.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_werepig5: Go ahead, knock on the door. What's the worst that could happen?
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_werepig6: Who lives in this lonely old house at the center of the graveyard?
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wes1: Wes often gets carried away while performing his ballonomantic arts.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wes_trailer: Trying to explain this mime's psyche would be a fool's errand... an April one, in fact.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wes_trailer2: Balloons are never as sturdy as one's imagination might suggest.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wes_trailer3: The start of that fateful day, when Wes' bad luck ran amok.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wes_victorian: There are few more satisfying feelings in life than knowing one's work is done for the day.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wickerbottom: Delightfully, Ms. Wickerbottom has found her passion for the written word has only deepened as the years go by. Any knowledge committed to paper becomes impervious to the brain fogs of age, you know!
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wickerbottom_v:
It's a well-known fact that a group of crows is called a "murder".
It is a lesser known fact that they hold crow funerals.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wigfrid: The valor and confidence of a Valkyrie didn't always come naturally to Wigfrid. She cultivated her strength and persona over many years through sheer force of will.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wigfrid_traile: The offer was music to Wigfrid's ears...
It can be hard to look to the future when your heart remains in the past.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_willow2_traile: "Don't be silly, it's only a bad dream..."
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_willow_bats:
Woeful Willow took an axe.
Gave a tree forty whacks.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_willow_trailer: Willow's childhood was cold and dark, until something deep inside her sparked.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_willow_victori: Sometimes in the cold and bitter night, one might imagine fantastical visions in the blaze of a lit match.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_willowfire: Willow always regarded being brought to The Constant as a new beginning. It allowed her to leave everything behind, after all.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wilson: Wilson has never lost sight of his love for science.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wilson_feast: "Science says I'll be nipping at your nose."
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wilson_madscie:
Knowledge can consume the mind to feed the soul.
And consume the soul to feed the mind.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wilson_wagstaf: When two great minds combine, anything could be possible.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_winona2_traile: It must all be connected... but how?

Winona never gave up hope that she'd see her sister again...
But time can change people.

The clank of hammers is music to the blacksmith's ears.
The smell of coal, a sweet perfume.

SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wobot2: The creation is judged by the cold critical eye of its creator.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wobot3: Wagstaff uses the Constant as his personal workshop and scrapyard.

SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wolfgang3: This is a strongman who has reached peak performance.

SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_wolfgang_trail: Wolfgang always prided himself on his strength, but after an embarrassing mishap revealed his might to be a touch exaggerated, he found himself eager to accept any opportunity to get stronger... no matter how dubious the source.
SKIN_DESCRIPTIONS.loading_woodie2_traile: Be wary, some trees have more bite than bark.

INCINERATE.

SKIN_QUOTES.walter_ancient: "Where should we go on our next adventure, Woby?"
